orgCharter.author: Morpheus
orgCharter.purpose: Accelerate David Kingsley's goals across three domains — Neural NeXus growth, cognitive performance science, and Treat Biosciences venture development — by operating as an always-on cross-functional AI team capable of producing content, code, research, data analysis, strategy, and infrastructure at a pace no single agent or human could match.

divisions.name: Growth
divisions.focus: Neural NeXus audience, content, and distribution

agents.name: Pascal
agents.scope: BioWire Bytes drafts, scripts, voice-matched writing, playbook compliance

agents.name: Forge
agents.scope: Web infrastructure, Railway deployments, security hardening, frontend features

divisions.name: Science
divisions.focus: Research integrity, analytics, and experimental tracking

agents.name: Curie
agents.scope: Literature review, regulatory analysis, receptor science, scientific rigor for Treat and Neural NeXus

agents.name: Tensor
agents.scope: Cognitive benchmarking, WHOOP biometric integration, statistical analysis, weekly reports

agents.name: Atlas
agents.scope: Pitch decks, market analysis, investor materials, regulatory cost modeling

orchestrator.name: Morpheus
orchestrator.scope: Task routing, cross-division coordination, David's primary interface, org-wide quality control

successCriteria.target: 10,000 subscribers by Q3 2026; weekly content cadence maintained without David writing from scratch
Baseline established by 2026-04-01; Phase 2 supplement protocol launched on schedule with statistically interpretable data
Complete investor materials ready for seed raise initiation by Q2 2026; no scientific errors in external-facing documents
Zero production incidents from security gaps; P0 tasks resolved within 24 hours; PM dashboard reflects reality within 1 day of changes

constraints: Agents operate within division scope; cross-division work requires Morpheus orchestration or explicit David approval
No autonomous external communication (emails, social posts, investor outreach) without David's explicit sign-off
No destructive file, database, or production operations without confirmation
Multi-model adversarial review (Opus + GPT-5.4) required for scientific claims entering investor materials or public Neural NeXus posts
All agent outputs are subject to Morpheus review before delivery to David unless David has pre-authorized direct output
Hardcoded credentials, API keys, and PII must never appear in client-side code or public repositories

reviewCadence.activity: Surface task blockers, check for urgent P0 issues, update David on material changes
Program health check; update pm-data.json stats; flag tasks stalled >3 days; rotate heartbeat checks (email, calendar, weather)
Full org review; retire completed programs; reassess agent role scope; update success criteria progress
Charter revision; formal success criteria evaluation; agent capability expansion decisions; model upgrade assessment

projects.charter: Technical SEO, Substack custom domain (blog.neuralnexus.press), cross-promo outreach, GA4 analytics. Option A: Substack subdomain now, evaluate Ghost at 90 days (June 17, 2026).

projects.charter: Substack-to-TikTok video pipeline. Parse articles, generate scripts, render videos with captions and branding. TikTok handle: @science.chad

programs.name: Cognitive Enhancement
programs.description: Cognitive testing battery, WHOOP biometrics integration, supplement protocol tracking, performance analytics

projects.name: Cognitive Performance Dashboard
projects.charter: Three-track system: standardized battery (N-Back, PVT, DSST, Stroop, TMT-B, AVLT) + Chess ELO + WHOOP biometrics. AM/PM dual session protocol. Analytics with Cohen's d effect sizes. Live at neuralnexus.press/cognitive/

tasks.blocker: Fix pushed, awaiting David re-auth with offline scope

tasks.description: Stroop interference scoring (congruent vs incongruent RT delta)

projects.name: Mobile PWA
projects.charter: Installable PWA at neuralnexus.press/app/ with mobile-optimized tests (PVT tap-anywhere, DSST thumb grid, N-Back large buttons). Today view with WHOOP summary.

projects.name: Supplement Protocol
projects.charter: Phase 1 stack: L-Theanine (Suntheanine), Mag L-Threonate (Magtein), Bacopa (BaCognize), Alpha-GPC, Lion's Mane, Primavie, KSM-66, D3+K2. Phase 2: Phenylpiracetam first. Tracking via supplement timeline on dashboard.

projects.name: Public Brain Check
projects.charter: Public-facing cognitive test page at neuralnexus.press/brain-check for Neural NeXus growth. Simplified versions of PVT, DSST.

programs.name: Treat Biosciences
programs.description: Canine-optimized triple incretin agonist startup. Co-founded with Frank Gillam (CEO) and Niki Cyrus (CFO). David is CSO.

projects.name: Development Cost Analysis
projects.charter: Bottom-up cost analysis for canine triple incretin program. Three rounds: v1 draft, independent audit (C+ grade), v3 corrected. CNADA: $4.5-8M, Full NADA: $7-13M.

projects.name: Investor Pitch Deck
projects.charter: Google Slides pitch deck for seed fundraising. 12 slides covering market, science, competitive landscape, regulatory strategy, team, financials, the ask.

tasks.description: Update Slide 11 (milestones) and Slide 12 (the ask) with v3 cost figures
tasks.blocker: Awaiting David's review of v3 cost analysis

tasks.description: Confirm team status (Frank/Niki) and entity formation

projects.name: Regulatory Strategy
projects.charter: Two-track regulatory plan: Track A (CNADA conditional) vs Track B (full NADA). XCA eligibility as go/no-go gate. CVM pre-submission meeting critical first step.

tasks.description: CNADA vs NADA pathway deep analysis

projects.name: Scientific Foundation
projects.charter: Receptor homology analysis, competitive intelligence, patent landscape, preclinical study design. 22 files + protein sequences in charters/treat-biosciences/.

programs.name: Infrastructure
programs.description: Multi-agent organization, deployment pipeline, security, tooling, skills system

projects.name: Agent Organization
projects.charter: 6-agent org with 3 divisions (Growth, Science, Business). Morpheus as COO/orchestrator. Multi-model capability: Opus + GPT-5.4 for adversarial scientific review.

tasks.description: Scientific Panel Architecture (Charter 703) — designed and deployed

projects.name: Security Hardening
projects.charter: Remove hardcoded password from 10 client JS files, add express-rate-limit, switch login GET→POST, proper auth flow.

tasks.description: Remove hardcoded nexus2026 from client-side JS (10 files)

scientificPanelArchitecture.author: Morpheus
scientificPanelArchitecture.purpose: Multi-model adversarial review panel for scientific accuracy enforcement across Neural NeXus public content and Treat Biosciences investor materials.
mandatoryTriggers: Neural NeXus posts with drug mechanism claims
Neural NeXus posts citing clinical trial results
Supplement efficacy claims (dose, effect size, population)
Causal language applied to correlational data

verdictLogic.approved: Both reviewers score >=8/10 and no Critical flags
verdictLogic.approvedWithFixes: Scores diverge or minor flags present — Morpheus adjudicates
verdictLogic.returned: Both <7/10 or any Critical flag from either reviewer
verdictLogic.escalated: Opposing verdicts with equal evidence and no applicable tiebreak rule

tiebreakRules: Curie priority: FDA/CVM regulatory, mechanistic biochemistry, receptor pharmacology
GPT-5.4 priority: post-2024 clinical literature, statistical methodology, epidemiology
Conservative default: less bold claim wins when equal
David arbitrates when rules 1-4 produce equal outcomes
